name: Black Beans (with the Broth You Can Make a Soup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the dried black beans in a large pot and cover with enough water to fully submerge them. Allow the beans to soak overnight.
2. The next day, drain the beans and place them back in the pot. Add more water if necessary, ensuring there is enough liquid to cook the beans. Include the epazote leaves, chopped onions, and salt.
3. Cook the beans over low heat until they are soft. Gradually add boiling water as needed during cooking.
4. Once the beans are tender, drain any remaining liquid.
5. Heat vegetable oil in a pan and fry the chopped onions until transparent. Add the cooked black beans to the pan. Mash them as desired.
6. Do not add much broth at this stage. You can use the remaining broth to prepare a soup or discard it after cooking for an additional 20-30 minutes.
